title: Genshin Mondstadt Music
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This Resource Pack adds Genshin Mondstadt OST into Minecraft, replacing vanilla music.

This does not alter Discs.

If you want something like this for other versions of the game check out [Genshin Music Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/genshin-music-pack)

 

If you want to get updates on the pack development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
